scan.title: Search for Gasolina Sensor
scan.description: Found Gasolina sensors are shown below. Select your sensor, or click **Scan again** if none appear yet.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Gasolina Sensor Found
bluetooth_confirm.description: Sensor **{name}** was found. Click Next to pair it.

bond.title: Pair Sensor
bond.description:
**Press the SYNC button on the sensor for 5 seconds** until the LED flashes.

Then click **Pair** within 30 seconds – Home Assistant will connect to the sensor once to establish a Bluetooth bond.

This step is only required during initial setup.

bottle_size.title: Choose Bottle Size
bottle_size.description: Select your gas bottle size. This is required for accurate fill level calculation.

error.bond_failed: Connection failed. Make sure the SYNC button was pressed and the sensor is in range.
error.bond_timeout: Connection timed out. Press the SYNC button again and click Pair immediately.
error.no_devices_found_yet: No sensor found yet. Click 'Scan again' (the sensor broadcasts every ~60 seconds).

init.title: Gasolina Options
init.description:
Periodic bottle size refresh via Bluetooth.

⚠️ Frequent connections increase the sensor's battery drain.
